answer: Shopify provides free access for developers through the Shopify Partner Program. You can create an unlimited number of development stores for free to build, test, and preview apps using Shopify APIs [1]. While these stores are free, they are restricted to installing free or Partner-friendly apps [1]. API usage remains subject to rate limits, which scale based on the store's plan tier [2][3]. Developers can test billing logic and API integrations in these environments without incurring charges, though specific app store listing features may require a one-time registration fee [4][5][6].
